ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" INTEGER /* Type of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date the next calibration is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the location data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Range of values the sensor can measure */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the sensor measurements */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data point (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data point */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the data point (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if the data point is invalid */,
  "correction_value" REAL /* Corrected value if the data point was invalid */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Additional notes or annotations for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being checked */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data point */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality check */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used to validate the data point */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was corrected */,
  "correction_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who corrected the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data collector, analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Token for user session management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., sensor data, user management) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
